judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable social media platform with strong margins and a clean balance sheet.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 79.1%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 69.1% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 679.8% — demonstrates significant profitability leverage.
Gross margin 91.4% and Profit margin 28.6% — industry-leading profitability.
Forward P/E 16.61x vs trailing 41.92x — multiple compression suggests strong expected earnings growth.
Free cash flow $564.09M — robust cash generation supports growth initiatives.
negatives: Price/Sales (TTM) 11.42x — valuation is high on a sales basis.
Beta 1.85 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.
PEG ratio 1.14 — suggests growth may be priced in, though still reasonable.
Analyst mean target $224.92 (low $120.00) indicates a wide dispersion of future expectations.

news.paragraph: Needham reiterated a bullish stance on Reddit, Inc. (RDDT) following its recent performance and analyst targets. The social media platform's stock has seen positive analyst coverage, with a consensus 'buy' rating and a mean target price significantly above the current trading level. Traders should consider the upcoming earnings report on July 30th as a potential catalyst, alongside the stock's high beta and significant analyst growth estimates.

headlines.title: Needham Continues To Stay Bullish on Reddit, Inc. (RDDT)

examples.body: $RDDT say it with me…baillie gifford…5%+ shareholder
$RDDT my earlier % numbers, did not include taxes, which added 190 basis points to the 1q number.
$RDDT I tried to swing this POS & ended up bag holding since January. The stock is stagnant for reasons that seem so arbitrary. I can't wait to unload …
$RDDT you best sell your space waffles $ASTS …rocketlab just announced cash grab, because money losing spacex about to torch the neighborhood.
